channel.title: Hutch
channel.description: Updates for Hutch — multi-tool macOS utility from Coursion.

item.title: Version 0.4.5
item.description: Hutch now checks for updates 5s after launch so the 'Update available' prompt surfaces without waiting for the hourly tick.

item.title: Version 0.4.4
item.description: Updates now surface a visible 'Update available' prompt instead of installing silently in the background. Sparkle check interval lowered to hourly so new releases reach you within an hour.

item.title: Version 0.4.3
item.description: Stash now preserves original filenames on Finder drops. Clearer mode descriptions in Stash settings (cut+paste / copy+paste). About → Coursion button updated to coursion.studio.

item.title: Version 0.4.2
item.description: Fix: 1Password and other menu-bar-only apps now open from Pounce.

item.title: Version 0.3.1
item.description: Pounce v2 — recents, running-app dot, switch-vs-launch, modifier hints, clipboard history, custom commands, calculator, conversions (live FX), markdown preview, music control, recent downloads, window switcher (jumps to specific window), inline window-snap commands, web-search bangs (g/gh/w/npm/yt/mdn/so/amz/map), URL/email detection, iOS simulator picker with inline Boot/Shutdown/Delete buttons, Reset Audio + Xcode-junk cleanup actions, AI prompts via your own Anthropic/OpenAI/Ollama keys (Keychain-stored), help cheatsheet ("?" inside Pounce). Plus a wake-fix for Window Manager hotkeys clobbering Pounce/Stash/Toggles.

item.title: Version 0.2.3
item.description: Toggles panel rows now light up in their semantic color (Dark Mode indigo, Keep Awake orange, Lock Screen red, etc.) instead of the global accent. Plus an in-app banner when a Sparkle update is found.

item.title: Version 0.1.4
item.description: Polish: Permissions sidebar attention dot is a single circle with a soft amber glow — properly centered. More from us: AIStats now links to its Mac App Store page.
